scripts.dev: pnpm with:local-env concurrently -k -n api,worker,web -c blue,magenta,green "pnpm --filter @kanera/api dev" "pnpm --filter @kanera/api dev:worker" "pnpm --filter @kanera/web start"
scripts.dev:hosted: pnpm with:hosted-local-env concurrently -k -n api,worker,web -c blue,magenta,green "pnpm --filter @kanera/api dev" "pnpm --filter @kanera/api dev:worker" "pnpm --filter @kanera/web start"
scripts.dev:https: pnpm with:local-env concurrently -k -n api,worker,web -c blue,magenta,green "WEB_ORIGIN=https://localhost:4200 pnpm --filter @kanera/api dev" "WEB_ORIGIN=https://localhost:4200 pnpm --filter @kanera/api dev:worker" "pnpm --filter @kanera/web start:https"
scripts.dev:db:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && pnpm dev:db && pnpm db:migrate:local
scripts.dev:db:reset:seed: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && pnpm dev:db && pnpm db:migrate:local && pnpm db:seed:local
scripts.dev:db:reset:seed:hosted: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && pnpm dev:db && pnpm db:migrate:hosted:local && pnpm db:seed:hosted:local
scripts.dev:db:reset:seed:hosted:account: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && pnpm dev:db && pnpm db:migrate:hosted:local && pnpm db:seed:hosted-accounts
scripts.test: pnpm test:api && pnpm --filter @kanera/web test && pnpm test:mcp && pnpm test:api:integration && pnpm test:mcp:integration
scripts.with:hosted-local-env: KANERA_DEPLOYMENT_MODE=hosted HOSTED_PRO_PRICE_MONTHLY_CENTS=400 HOSTED_PRO_PRICE_ANNUAL_CENTS=300 STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_local STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=pk_test_local STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET=whsec_test_local STRIPE_PRICE_ID_PRO_MONTHLY=price_local_monthly STRIPE_PRICE_ID_PRO_ANNUAL=price_local_annual pnpm with:local-env
